text: An assessment of the physicochemical characteristics of GP2013 showed that it was highly similar to the benchmark comparator rituximab in terms of primary and higher order structure, post-translational modifications, as well as size heterogeneity. An extensive functional characterization was also performed to determine that GP2013 possesses biological activity that is essentially indistinguishable from that of the benchmark comparator.
explanation: Formal, domain-specific language typical of scientific reports; no obvious AI fingerprints, but AI authorship can't be ruled out.
